title: Commodity Volume Sold
query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MarketSell WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT COALESCE(Type_Localised, 'Unknown') AS label, CAST(SUM(Count) AS INTEGER) AS value FROM MarketSell WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY Type_Localised ORDER BY value DESC
